title: orontium sempervirens
intro: Orontium sempervirens, also known as the golden club or wild gold, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the orchid family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of the plant are said to include relief from fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to aid in digestion and reduce stress. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for various uses in traditional medicine and herbal remedies.
